title: ColorName Result
description: Returns the name of the color model found to be the best match.
notes: ColorName is the name given to the color model of the best matched model.  The ColorIndex result is the index of the matched model.  The name of a color model can be changed at design time from the [Vision Guide] window by clicking the [Teach] button for the object and changing the color model names.  The model name can also be changed by setting the ModelName property from SPEL+ at runtime.
